args.query:
WITH non_binary AS (
  SELECT id, sample_repo_name
  FROM contents
  WHERE repo_data_description ILIKE '%binary: false%'
), freq AS (
  SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS copies
  FROM non_binary
  GROUP BY id
), max_id AS (
  SELECT id, copies
  FROM freq
  ORDER BY copies DESC, id
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT nb.sample_repo_name AS repo_name, m.copies, m.id
FROM max_id m
JOIN non_binary nb USING (id)
ORDER BY nb.sample_repo_name
LIMIT 1;

SELECT nb.sample_repo_name AS repo_name, m.copies, m.id
FROM max_id m
JOIN non_binary nb USING (id)
ORDER BY nb.sample_repo_name
LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(CASE WHEN repo_data_description ILIKE '%binary: false%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS non_binary_n FROM contents;

exec_args.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(CASE WHEN repo_data_description ILIKE '%binary: false%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS non_binary_n FROM contents;

args.query: SELECT repo_data_description FROM contents WHERE repo_data_description IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql: SELECT repo_data_description FROM contents WHERE repo_data_description IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5;

args.query:
WITH non_binary AS (
  SELECT id, sample_repo_name, sample_path
  FROM contents
  WHERE repo_data_description ILIKE '%non-binary%'
), freq AS (
  SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS copies
  FROM non_binary
  GROUP BY id
), max_id AS (
  SELECT id, copies
  FROM freq
  ORDER BY copies DESC, id
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT nb.sample_repo_name AS repo_name, nb.sample_path, m.copies, m.id
FROM max_id m
JOIN non_binary nb USING (id)
ORDER BY nb.sample_repo_name
LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT MAX(cnt) AS max_copies FROM (SELECT id, COUNT(*) cnt FROM contents WHERE repo_data_description ILIKE '%non-binary%' GROUP BY id);

exec_args.sql: SELECT MAX(cnt) AS max_copies FROM (SELECT id, COUNT(*) cnt FROM contents WHERE repo_data_description ILIKE '%non-binary%' GROUP BY id);

args.query:
WITH swift_non_binary AS (
  SELECT c.id, c.sample_repo_name, c.sample_path
  FROM contents c
  WHERE c.sample_path ILIKE '%.swift'
    AND c.repo_data_description ILIKE '%non-binary%'
), freq AS (
  SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS copies
  FROM swift_non_binary
  GROUP BY id
), max_id AS (
  SELECT id, copies
  FROM freq
  ORDER BY copies DESC, id
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT s.sample_repo_name AS repo_name, s.sample_path, m.copies, m.id
FROM max_id m
JOIN swift_non_binary s USING (id)
ORDER BY s.sample_repo_name
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH swift_non_binary AS (
  SELECT c.id, c.sample_repo_name, c.sample_path
  FROM contents c
  WHERE c.sample_path ILIKE '%.swift'
    AND c.repo_data_description ILIKE '%non-binary%'
), freq AS (
  SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS copies
  FROM swift_non_binary
  GROUP BY id
), max_id AS (
  SELECT id, copies
  FROM freq
  ORDER BY copies DESC, id
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT s.sample_repo_name AS repo_name, s.sample_path, m.copies, m.id
FROM max_id m
JOIN swift_non_binary s USING (id)
ORDER BY s.sample_repo_name
LIMIT 1;
